grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Covers risk management, file management, client care, training, financial management, people management, and cyber security comprehensively

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Lists specific evidence like training logs, file review logs, bank statements, induction checklists, PI insurance certificates, and privacy policies

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: No mention of Senior Responsible Officer or SRO requirement anywhere in the response

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Does not specifically mention protocol compliance monitoring as a requirement

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Dedicated section on Information Management and Cyber Security covering data protection, disaster recovery, and Cyber Essentials alignment

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Detailed coverage of file reviews, supervision requirements, standardized document control, and key dates monitoring
